# all-features section.
# DO NOT EDIT BY HAND — commit regenerated changes together with the code.

pub fn zenwebp::decoder::decode_bgr_into(&[u8], &mut [u8], u32) -> zenwebp::DecodeResult<(u32, u32)>
pub fn zenwebp::decoder::decode_bgra(&[u8]) -> zenwebp::DecodeResult<(alloc::vec::Vec<u8>, u32, u32)>
pub fn zenwebp::decoder::decode_bgra_into(&[u8], &mut [u8], u32) -> zenwebp::DecodeResult<(u32, u32)>
pub fn zenwebp::decoder::decode_bgra_premultiplied(&[u8]) -> zenwebp::DecodeResult<(alloc::vec::Vec<u8>, u32, u32)>
pub fn zenwebp::decoder::decode_rgb(&[u8]) -> zenwebp::DecodeResult<(alloc::vec::Vec<u8>, u32, u32)>
pub fn zenwebp::decoder::decode_rgb565(&[u8]) -> zenwebp::DecodeResult<(alloc::vec::Vec<u8>, u32, u32)>
pub fn zenwebp::decoder::decode_rgb_into(&[u8], &mut [u8], u32) -> zenwebp::DecodeResult<(u32, u32)>
pub fn zenwebp::decoder::decode_rgba(&[u8]) -> zenwebp::DecodeResult<(alloc::vec::Vec<u8>, u32, u32)>
pub fn zenwebp::decoder::decode_rgba4444(&[u8]) -> zenwebp::DecodeResult<(alloc::vec::Vec<u8>, u32, u32)>
pub fn zenwebp::decoder::decode_rgba_into(&[u8], &mut [u8], u32) -> zenwebp::DecodeResult<(u32, u32)>
pub fn zenwebp::decoder::decode_rgba_premultiplied(&[u8]) -> zenwebp::DecodeResult<(alloc::vec::Vec<u8>, u32, u32)>
pub fn zenwebp::decoder::decode_yuv420(&[u8]) -> zenwebp::DecodeResult<zenwebp::decoder::YuvPlanes>
pub type zenwebp::decoder::DecodeResult<T> = core::result::Result<T, whereat::at::At<zenwebp::DecodeError>>

pub struct zenwebp::encoder::EncodeRequest<'a>
impl<'a> zenwebp::EncodeRequest<'a>
pub fn zenwebp::EncodeRequest<'a>::encode(self) -> zenwebp::EncodeResult<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>>
pub fn zenwebp::EncodeRequest<'a>::encode_into(self, &mut alloc::vec::Vec<u8>) -> zenwebp::EncodeResult<()>
pub fn zenwebp::EncodeRequest<'a>::encode_to<W: std::io::Write>(self, W) -> zenwebp::EncodeResult<()>
pub fn zenwebp::EncodeRequest<'a>::encode_with_metrics(self) -> zenwebp::EncodeResult<(alloc::vec::Vec<u8>, super::zensim_target::ZensimEncodeMetrics)>
pub fn zenwebp::EncodeRequest<'a>::encode_with_stats(self) -> zenwebp::EncodeResult<(alloc::vec::Vec<u8>, zenwebp::encoder::EncodeStats)>
pub fn zenwebp::EncodeRequest<'a>::lossless(&'a config::LosslessConfig, &'a [u8], zenwebp::PixelLayout, u32, u32) -> Self
pub fn zenwebp::EncodeRequest<'a>::lossy(&'a config::LossyConfig, &'a [u8], zenwebp::PixelLayout, u32, u32) -> Self
pub fn zenwebp::EncodeRequest<'a>::new(&'a config::EncoderConfig, &'a [u8], zenwebp::PixelLayout, u32, u32) -> Self
pub fn zenwebp::EncodeRequest<'a>::with_exif(self, &'a [u8]) -> Self
pub fn zenwebp::EncodeRequest<'a>::with_icc_profile(self, &'a [u8]) -> Self
pub fn zenwebp::EncodeRequest<'a>::with_metadata(self, zenwebp::ImageMetadata<'a>) -> Self
pub fn zenwebp::EncodeRequest<'a>::with_progress(self, &'a dyn zenwebp::encoder::EncodeProgress) -> Self
pub fn zenwebp::EncodeRequest<'a>::with_stop(self, &'a dyn enough::Stop) -> Self
pub fn zenwebp::EncodeRequest<'a>::with_stride(self, usize) -> Self
pub fn zenwebp::EncodeRequest<'a>::with_xmp(self, &'a [u8]) -> Self
impl<'a> core::marker::Freeze for zenwebp::EncodeRequest<'a>

pub zenwebp::mux::DemuxFrame::frame_num: u32
pub zenwebp::mux::DemuxFrame::has_alpha: bool
pub zenwebp::mux::DemuxFrame::height: u32
pub zenwebp::mux::DemuxFrame::is_lossy: bool
pub zenwebp::mux::DemuxFrame::width: u32
pub zenwebp::mux::DemuxFrame::x_offset: u32
pub zenwebp::mux::DemuxFrame::y_offset: u32
impl<'a> core::clone::Clone for zenwebp::mux::DemuxFrame<'a>
pub fn zenwebp::mux::DemuxFrame<'a>::clone(&self) -> zenwebp::mux::DemuxFrame<'a>
impl<'a> core::fmt::Debug for zenwebp::mux::DemuxFrame<'a>
pub fn zenwebp::mux::DemuxFrame<'a>::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl<'a> core::marker::Freeze for zenwebp::mux::DemuxFrame<'a>

pub struct zenwebp::mux::DemuxFrameIter<'a, 'b>

impl<'a, 'b> core::iter::traits::iterator::Iterator for zenwebp::mux::DemuxFrameIter<'a, 'b>
pub type zenwebp::mux::DemuxFrameIter<'a, 'b>::Item = zenwebp::mux::DemuxFrame<'a>
pub fn zenwebp::mux::DemuxFrameIter<'a, 'b>::next(&mut self) -> core::option::Option<Self::Item>
pub fn zenwebp::mux::DemuxFrameIter<'a, 'b>::size_hint(&self) -> (usize, core::option::Option<usize>)

impl<'a, 'b> core::marker::Send for zenwebp::mux::DemuxFrameIter<'a, 'b>

pub fn zenwebp::mux::WebPMux::set_xmp(&mut self, alloc::vec::Vec<u8>)

impl core::marker::Send for zenwebp::mux::WebPMux
impl core::marker::Sync for zenwebp::mux::WebPMux

impl core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for zenwebp::mux::WebPMux
pub type zenwebp::mux::MuxResult<T> = core::result::Result<T, whereat::at::At<zenwebp::mux::MuxError>>
pub mod zenwebp::oneshot
pub fn zenwebp::oneshot::decode_argb(&[u8]) -> zenwebp::DecodeResult<(alloc::vec::Vec<u8>, u32, u32)>

#[non_exhaustive] pub enum zenwebp::DecodeError
pub zenwebp::DecodeError::AlphaChunkSizeMismatch
pub zenwebp::DecodeError::BitStreamError
pub zenwebp::DecodeError::Cancelled(enough::reason::StopReason)
pub zenwebp::DecodeError::ChromaPredictionModeInvalid(i8)
pub zenwebp::DecodeError::ChunkHeaderInvalid([u8; 4])
pub zenwebp::DecodeError::ChunkMissing
pub zenwebp::DecodeError::ColorSpaceInvalid(u8)
pub zenwebp::DecodeError::FrameOutsideImage
pub zenwebp::DecodeError::HuffmanError
pub zenwebp::DecodeError::ImageTooLarge
pub zenwebp::DecodeError::InconsistentImageSizes
pub zenwebp::DecodeError::IntraPredictionModeInvalid(i8)
pub zenwebp::DecodeError::InvalidAlphaPreprocessing
pub zenwebp::DecodeError::InvalidChunkSize
pub zenwebp::DecodeError::InvalidColorCacheBits(u8)
pub zenwebp::DecodeError::InvalidCompressionMethod
pub zenwebp::DecodeError::InvalidParameter(alloc::string::String)
pub zenwebp::DecodeError::IoError(std::io::error::Error)
pub zenwebp::DecodeError::LosslessSignatureInvalid(u8)
pub zenwebp::DecodeError::LumaPredictionModeInvalid(i8)
pub zenwebp::DecodeError::MemoryLimitExceeded
pub zenwebp::DecodeError::NoMoreFrames
pub zenwebp::DecodeError::NotEnoughInitData
pub zenwebp::DecodeError::RiffSignatureInvalid([u8; 4])
pub zenwebp::DecodeError::TransformError
pub zenwebp::DecodeError::UnsupportedFeature(alloc::string::String)
pub zenwebp::DecodeError::VersionNumberInvalid(u8)
pub zenwebp::DecodeError::Vp8MagicInvalid([u8; 3])
pub zenwebp::DecodeError::WebpSignatureInvalid([u8; 4])

pub fn zenwebp::DecodeError::from(std::io::error::Error) -> Self

pub fn zenwebp::PixelLayout::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl core::fmt::Display for zenwebp::PixelLayout
pub fn zenwebp::PixelLayout::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result

pub type zenwebp::DecodeResult<T> = core::result::Result<T, whereat::at::At<zenwebp::DecodeError>>
pub type zenwebp::EncodeResult<T> = core::result::Result<T, whereat::at::At<zenwebp::EncodeError>>

impl core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for zenwebp::decoder::BitstreamFormat
#[non_exhaustive] pub enum zenwebp::decoder::DecodeError
pub zenwebp::decoder::DecodeError::AlphaChunkSizeMismatch
pub zenwebp::decoder::DecodeError::BitStreamError
pub zenwebp::decoder::DecodeError::Cancelled(enough::reason::StopReason)
pub zenwebp::decoder::DecodeError::ChromaPredictionModeInvalid(i8)
pub zenwebp::decoder::DecodeError::ChunkHeaderInvalid([u8; 4])
pub zenwebp::decoder::DecodeError::ChunkMissing
pub zenwebp::decoder::DecodeError::ColorSpaceInvalid(u8)
pub zenwebp::decoder::DecodeError::FrameOutsideImage
pub zenwebp::decoder::DecodeError::HuffmanError
pub zenwebp::decoder::DecodeError::ImageTooLarge
pub zenwebp::decoder::DecodeError::InconsistentImageSizes
pub zenwebp::decoder::DecodeError::IntraPredictionModeInvalid(i8)
pub zenwebp::decoder::DecodeError::InvalidAlphaPreprocessing
pub zenwebp::decoder::DecodeError::InvalidChunkSize
pub zenwebp::decoder::DecodeError::InvalidColorCacheBits(u8)
pub zenwebp::decoder::DecodeError::InvalidCompressionMethod
pub zenwebp::decoder::DecodeError::InvalidParameter(alloc::string::String)
pub zenwebp::decoder::DecodeError::IoError(std::io::error::Error)
pub zenwebp::decoder::DecodeError::LosslessSignatureInvalid(u8)
pub zenwebp::decoder::DecodeError::LumaPredictionModeInvalid(i8)
pub zenwebp::decoder::DecodeError::MemoryLimitExceeded
pub zenwebp::decoder::DecodeError::NoMoreFrames
pub zenwebp::decoder::DecodeError::NotEnoughInitData
pub zenwebp::decoder::DecodeError::RiffSignatureInvalid([u8; 4])
pub zenwebp::decoder::DecodeError::TransformError
pub zenwebp::decoder::DecodeError::UnsupportedFeature(alloc::string::String)
pub zenwebp::decoder::DecodeError::UnsupportedOperation(zencodec::capabilities::UnsupportedOperation)
pub zenwebp::decoder::DecodeError::VersionNumberInvalid(u8)
pub zenwebp::decoder::DecodeError::Vp8MagicInvalid([u8; 3])
pub zenwebp::decoder::DecodeError::WebpSignatureInvalid([u8; 4])
impl core::convert::From<enough::reason::StopReason> for zenwebp::DecodeError
pub fn zenwebp::DecodeError::from(enough::reason::StopReason) -> Self
impl core::convert::From<std::io::error::Error> for zenwebp::DecodeError
pub fn zenwebp::DecodeError::from(std::io::error::Error) -> Self
impl core::convert::From<whereat::at::At<zenwebp::DecodeError>> for zenwebp::DecodeError
pub fn zenwebp::DecodeError::from(whereat::at::At<zenwebp::DecodeError>) -> Self
impl core::convert::From<zencodec::capabilities::UnsupportedOperation> for zenwebp::DecodeError
pub fn zenwebp::DecodeError::from(zencodec::capabilities::UnsupportedOperation) -> Self
impl core::convert::From<zenwebp::DecodeError> for zenwebp::mux::MuxError
pub fn zenwebp::mux::MuxError::from(zenwebp::DecodeError) -> Self
impl core::error::Error for zenwebp::DecodeError
pub fn zenwebp::DecodeError::source(&self) -> core::option::Option<&(dyn core::error::Error + 'static)>
impl core::fmt::Debug for zenwebp::DecodeError
pub fn zenwebp::DecodeError::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl core::fmt::Display for zenwebp::DecodeError
pub fn zenwebp::DecodeError::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl core::marker::Freeze for zenwebp::DecodeError
impl core::marker::Send for zenwebp::DecodeError

pub fn zenwebp::decoder::decode_argb(&[u8]) -> zenwebp::DecodeResult<(alloc::vec::Vec<u8>, u32, u32)>
pub fn zenwebp::decoder::decode_argb_into(&[u8], &mut [u8], u32) -> zenwebp::DecodeResult<(u32, u32)>
pub fn zenwebp::decoder::decode_argb_premultiplied(&[u8]) -> zenwebp::DecodeResult<(alloc::vec::Vec<u8>, u32, u32)>
pub fn zenwebp::decoder::decode_bgr(&[u8]) -> zenwebp::DecodeResult<(alloc::vec::Vec<u8>, u32, u32)>
pub fn zenwebp::decoder::decode_bgr_into(&[u8], &mut [u8], u32) -> zenwebp::DecodeResult<(u32, u32)>
pub fn zenwebp::decoder::decode_bgra(&[u8]) -> zenwebp::DecodeResult<(alloc::vec::Vec<u8>, u32, u32)>
pub fn zenwebp::decoder::decode_bgra_into(&[u8], &mut [u8], u32) -> zenwebp::DecodeResult<(u32, u32)>
pub fn zenwebp::decoder::decode_bgra_premultiplied(&[u8]) -> zenwebp::DecodeResult<(alloc::vec::Vec<u8>, u32, u32)>
pub fn zenwebp::decoder::decode_rgb(&[u8]) -> zenwebp::DecodeResult<(alloc::vec::Vec<u8>, u32, u32)>
pub fn zenwebp::decoder::decode_rgb565(&[u8]) -> zenwebp::DecodeResult<(alloc::vec::Vec<u8>, u32, u32)>
pub fn zenwebp::decoder::decode_rgb_into(&[u8], &mut [u8], u32) -> zenwebp::DecodeResult<(u32, u32)>
pub fn zenwebp::decoder::decode_rgba(&[u8]) -> zenwebp::DecodeResult<(alloc::vec::Vec<u8>, u32, u32)>
pub fn zenwebp::decoder::decode_rgba4444(&[u8]) -> zenwebp::DecodeResult<(alloc::vec::Vec<u8>, u32, u32)>
pub fn zenwebp::decoder::decode_rgba_into(&[u8], &mut [u8], u32) -> zenwebp::DecodeResult<(u32, u32)>
pub fn zenwebp::decoder::decode_rgba_premultiplied(&[u8]) -> zenwebp::DecodeResult<(alloc::vec::Vec<u8>, u32, u32)>
pub fn zenwebp::decoder::decode_yuv420(&[u8]) -> zenwebp::DecodeResult<zenwebp::decoder::YuvPlanes>
pub type zenwebp::decoder::DecodeResult<T> = core::result::Result<T, whereat::at::At<zenwebp::DecodeError>>

pub struct zenwebp::encoder::EncodeRequest<'a>
impl<'a> zenwebp::EncodeRequest<'a>
pub fn zenwebp::EncodeRequest<'a>::encode(self) -> zenwebp::EncodeResult<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>>
pub fn zenwebp::EncodeRequest<'a>::encode_into(self, &mut alloc::vec::Vec<u8>) -> zenwebp::EncodeResult<()>
pub fn zenwebp::EncodeRequest<'a>::encode_to<W: std::io::Write>(self, W) -> zenwebp::EncodeResult<()>
pub fn zenwebp::EncodeRequest<'a>::encode_with_metrics(self) -> zenwebp::EncodeResult<(alloc::vec::Vec<u8>, super::zensim_target::ZensimEncodeMetrics)>
pub fn zenwebp::EncodeRequest<'a>::encode_with_stats(self) -> zenwebp::EncodeResult<(alloc::vec::Vec<u8>, zenwebp::encoder::EncodeStats)>
pub fn zenwebp::EncodeRequest<'a>::lossless(&'a config::LosslessConfig, &'a [u8], zenwebp::PixelLayout, u32, u32) -> Self
pub fn zenwebp::EncodeRequest<'a>::lossy(&'a config::LossyConfig, &'a [u8], zenwebp::PixelLayout, u32, u32) -> Self
pub fn zenwebp::EncodeRequest<'a>::new(&'a config::EncoderConfig, &'a [u8], zenwebp::PixelLayout, u32, u32) -> Self
pub fn zenwebp::EncodeRequest<'a>::with_exif(self, &'a [u8]) -> Self
pub fn zenwebp::EncodeRequest<'a>::with_icc_profile(self, &'a [u8]) -> Self
pub fn zenwebp::EncodeRequest<'a>::with_metadata(self, zenwebp::ImageMetadata<'a>) -> Self
pub fn zenwebp::EncodeRequest<'a>::with_progress(self, &'a dyn zenwebp::encoder::EncodeProgress) -> Self
pub fn zenwebp::EncodeRequest<'a>::with_stop(self, &'a dyn enough::Stop) -> Self
pub fn zenwebp::EncodeRequest<'a>::with_stride(self, usize) -> Self

pub fn zenwebp::zencodec::WebpDecoder<'_>::decode(self) -> core::result::Result<zencodec::output::DecodeOutput, whereat::at::At<zenwebp::DecodeError>>
impl<'a> core::marker::Freeze for zenwebp::zencodec::WebpDecoder<'a>
impl<'a> core::marker::Send for zenwebp::zencodec::WebpDecoder<'a>
impl<'a> core::marker::Sync for zenwebp::zencodec::WebpDecoder<'a>

impl<'a> core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for zenwebp::zencodec::WebpDecoder<'a>

pub zenwebp::DecodeError::BitStreamError
pub zenwebp::DecodeError::Cancelled(enough::reason::StopReason)
pub zenwebp::DecodeError::ChromaPredictionModeInvalid(i8)
pub zenwebp::DecodeError::ChunkHeaderInvalid([u8; 4])
pub zenwebp::DecodeError::ChunkMissing

pub zenwebp::DecodeError::FrameOutsideImage
pub zenwebp::DecodeError::HuffmanError

pub zenwebp::DecodeError::LumaPredictionModeInvalid(i8)
pub zenwebp::DecodeError::MemoryLimitExceeded

pub zenwebp::DecodeError::NotEnoughInitData

pub zenwebp::DecodeError::Vp8MagicInvalid([u8; 3])
pub zenwebp::DecodeError::WebpSignatureInvalid([u8; 4])

pub zenwebp::ValidationError::FilterSharpnessOutOfRange

pub zenwebp::ValidationError::FilterSharpnessOutOfRange::value: u8

pub zenwebp::ValidationError::SegmentsOutOfRange::valid: core::ops::range::RangeInclusive<u8>
pub zenwebp::ValidationError::SegmentsOutOfRange::value: u8
pub zenwebp::ValidationError::SharpYuvConvergenceThresholdInvalid
pub zenwebp::ValidationError::SharpYuvConvergenceThresholdInvalid::value: f32
pub zenwebp::ValidationError::SnsStrengthOutOfRange
pub zenwebp::ValidationError::SnsStrengthOutOfRange::valid: core::ops::range::RangeInclusive<u8>
pub zenwebp::ValidationError::SnsStrengthOutOfRange::value: u8
pub zenwebp::ValidationError::TargetMutuallyExclusive
pub zenwebp::ValidationError::TargetMutuallyExclusive::first: &'static str
pub zenwebp::ValidationError::TargetMutuallyExclusive::second: &'static str
pub zenwebp::ValidationError::TargetPsnrOutOfRange
pub zenwebp::ValidationError::TargetPsnrOutOfRange::valid: core::ops::range::RangeInclusive<f32>
pub zenwebp::ValidationError::TargetPsnrOutOfRange::value: f32
pub zenwebp::ValidationError::TargetZensimMaxPassesZero
pub zenwebp::ValidationError::TargetZensimMaxPassesZero::value: u8
pub zenwebp::ValidationError::TargetZensimOutOfRange
pub zenwebp::ValidationError::TargetZensimOutOfRange::valid: core::ops::range::RangeInclusive<f32>
pub zenwebp::ValidationError::TargetZensimOutOfRange::value: f32
pub zenwebp::ValidationError::TargetZensimToleranceInvalid
pub zenwebp::ValidationError::TargetZensimToleranceInvalid::field: &'static str
pub zenwebp::ValidationError::TargetZensimToleranceInvalid::value: f32

pub struct zenwebp::DecodeRequest<'a>
impl<'a> zenwebp::DecodeRequest<'a>
pub fn zenwebp::DecodeRequest<'a>::decode(self) -> zenwebp::DecodeResult<(alloc::vec::Vec<u8>, u32, u32, zenwebp::PixelLayout)>
pub fn zenwebp::DecodeRequest<'a>::decode_rgb(self) -> zenwebp::DecodeResult<(alloc::vec::Vec<u8>, u32, u32)>
pub fn zenwebp::DecodeRequest<'a>::decode_rgb_into(self, &mut [u8]) -> zenwebp::DecodeResult<(u32, u32)>

pub fn zenwebp::DecodeRequest<'a>::stop(self, &'a dyn enough::Stop) -> Self

#[non_exhaustive] pub struct zenwebp::Limits
pub zenwebp::Limits::max_file_size: core::option::Option<u64>
pub zenwebp::Limits::max_frame_count: core::option::Option<u64>
pub zenwebp::Limits::max_height: core::option::Option<u32>
pub zenwebp::Limits::max_memory: core::option::Option<u64>
pub zenwebp::Limits::max_total_pixels: core::option::Option<u64>
pub zenwebp::Limits::max_width: core::option::Option<u32>
impl zenwebp::Limits
pub fn zenwebp::Limits::check_dimensions(&self, u32, u32) -> core::result::Result<(), whereat::at::At<zenwebp::DecodeError>>
pub fn zenwebp::Limits::check_file_size(&self, u64) -> core::result::Result<(), whereat::at::At<zenwebp::DecodeError>>
pub fn zenwebp::Limits::check_frame_count(&self, usize) -> core::result::Result<(), whereat::at::At<zenwebp::DecodeError>>
pub fn zenwebp::Limits::check_memory(&self, usize) -> core::result::Result<(), whereat::at::At<zenwebp::DecodeError>>
pub fn zenwebp::Limits::max_dimensions(self, u32, u32) -> Self
pub fn zenwebp::Limits::max_file_size(self, u64) -> Self
pub fn zenwebp::Limits::max_frame_count(self, u64) -> Self
pub fn zenwebp::Limits::max_memory(self, u64) -> Self
pub fn zenwebp::Limits::max_total_pixels(self, u64) -> Self
pub fn zenwebp::Limits::none() -> Self
impl core::clone::Clone for zenwebp::Limits
pub fn zenwebp::Limits::clone(&self) -> zenwebp::Limits
impl core::cmp::PartialEq for zenwebp::Limits
pub fn zenwebp::Limits::eq(&self, &zenwebp::Limits) -> bool
impl core::default::Default for zenwebp::Limits
pub fn zenwebp::Limits::default() -> Self
impl core::fmt::Debug for zenwebp::Limits
pub fn zenwebp::Limits::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result

impl core::marker::Freeze for zenwebp::Limits

pub fn zenwebp::StreamingDecoder::finish_rgba_into(self, &mut [u8]) -> zenwebp::DecodeResult<(u32, u32)>

pub fn zenwebp::StreamingDecoder::is_complete(&self) -> bool

pub fn zenwebp::StreamingDecoder::with_config(zenwebp::DecodeConfig) -> Self

pub struct zenwebp::WebPDecoder<'a>
impl<'a> zenwebp::WebPDecoder<'a>
pub fn zenwebp::WebPDecoder<'a>::background_color_hint(&self) -> core::option::Option<[u8; 4]>
pub fn zenwebp::WebPDecoder<'a>::build(&'a [u8]) -> core::result::Result<Self, zenwebp::DecodeError>
pub fn zenwebp::WebPDecoder<'a>::dimensions(&self) -> (u32, u32)
pub fn zenwebp::WebPDecoder<'a>::exif_metadata(&mut self) -> zenwebp::DecodeResult<core::option::Option<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>>>
pub fn zenwebp::WebPDecoder<'a>::has_alpha(&self) -> bool
pub fn zenwebp::WebPDecoder<'a>::icc_profile(&mut self) -> zenwebp::DecodeResult<core::option::Option<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>>>
pub fn zenwebp::WebPDecoder<'a>::info(&self) -> zenwebp::ImageInfo
pub fn zenwebp::WebPDecoder<'a>::is_animated(&self) -> bool
pub fn zenwebp::WebPDecoder<'a>::is_lossy(&self) -> bool
pub fn zenwebp::WebPDecoder<'a>::loop_count(&self) -> zenwebp::decoder::LoopCount
pub fn zenwebp::WebPDecoder<'a>::loop_duration(&self) -> u64
pub fn zenwebp::WebPDecoder<'a>::new(&'a [u8]) -> zenwebp::DecodeResult<Self>
pub fn zenwebp::WebPDecoder<'a>::num_frames(&self) -> u32
pub fn zenwebp::WebPDecoder<'a>::output_buffer_size(&self) -> core::option::Option<usize>
pub fn zenwebp::WebPDecoder<'a>::read_frame(&mut self, &mut [u8]) -> zenwebp::DecodeResult<u32>
pub fn zenwebp::WebPDecoder<'a>::read_image(&mut self, &mut [u8]) -> zenwebp::DecodeResult<()>
pub fn zenwebp::WebPDecoder<'a>::reset_animation(&mut self) -> zenwebp::DecodeResult<()>
pub fn zenwebp::WebPDecoder<'a>::set_background_color(&mut self, [u8; 4]) -> zenwebp::DecodeResult<()>
pub fn zenwebp::WebPDecoder<'a>::set_limits(&mut self, zenwebp::Limits)
pub fn zenwebp::WebPDecoder<'a>::set_lossy_upsampling(&mut self, zenwebp::decoder::UpsamplingMethod)
pub fn zenwebp::WebPDecoder<'a>::set_memory_limit(&mut self, usize)
pub fn zenwebp::WebPDecoder<'a>::set_stop(&mut self, core::option::Option<&'a dyn enough::Stop>)
pub fn zenwebp::WebPDecoder<'a>::xmp_metadata(&mut self) -> zenwebp::DecodeResult<core::option::Option<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>>>
impl<'a> core::marker::Freeze for zenwebp::WebPDecoder<'a>
impl<'a> core::marker::Send for zenwebp::WebPDecoder<'a>
impl<'a> core::marker::Sync for zenwebp::WebPDecoder<'a>
impl<'a> core::marker::Unpin for zenwebp::WebPDecoder<'a>
impl<'a> core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for zenwebp::WebPDecoder<'a>
impl<'a> !core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for zenwebp::WebPDecoder<'a>
impl<'a> !core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for zenwebp::WebPDecoder<'a>
pub type zenwebp::DecodeResult<T> = core::result::Result<T, whereat::at::At<zenwebp::DecodeError>>
pub type zenwebp::EncodeResult<T> = core::result::Result<T, whereat::at::At<zenwebp::EncodeError>>
